text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
Medicare Plan Characteristics Codebook │ October 2025 │ V 1.7 138 

GAP_OONP_COINS_OS 

LABEL: Gap Out-of-Network Pharmacy Coinsurance for Other Days’ Supply 

DESCRIPTION: This variable identifies the beneficiary co-insurance percentage for a day’s supply of the drugs (other 
than one month) on this tier, using an out-of-network pharmacy (OONP) during the coverage gap 
phase of the Part D benefit. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 12 

SOURCE: CMS
